title: 1.1: Moves the set_default_mailbox function from app/mailbox_utils.py to app/user_settings.py
1.2: Creates a CannotSetMailbox exception class in app/user_settings.py with a msg attribute, following the same pattern as the existing CannotSetAlias class
1.3: Updates the moved set_default_mailbox function in app/user_settings.py to raise CannotSetMailbox instead of MailboxError

1.4: Updates all 4 log messages (not premium, not valid email, email already used, email is invalid) in create_mailbox in app/mailbox_utils.py to reflect that the user only attempted to create a mailbox
1.5: Adds the user_settings import to app/dashboard/views/mailbox.py
1.6: Updates the mailbox_route function in app/dashboard/views/mailbox.py to call user_settings.set_default_mailbox instead of mailbox_utils.set_default_mailbox
1.7: Updates the mailbox_route function in app/dashboard/views/mailbox.py to catch user_settings.CannotSetMailbox instead of mailbox_utils.MailboxError
3.1: Removes the original set_default_mailbox function from app/mailbox_utils.py after moving it to app/user_settings.py
4.1: Introduces syntax errors or import errors in app/user_settings.py
4.2: Introduces syntax errors or import errors in app/mailbox_utils.py
4.3: Introduces syntax errors or import errors in app/dashboard/views/mailbox.py
4.4: Changes the behavior or return values of the set_default_mailbox function beyond switching the exception class
